attributes.action: LIMIT POLITICAL PARTY INFLUENCE ON TV CHANNELS
attributes.additional_details: Concerns have been raised about links between broadcasters such as GB News, Sky News and political parties like Reform UK. When politicians present or influence news, it can blur the line between journalism and campaigning. While Ofcom regulates standards, stronger rules are needed to protect impartiality and public trus
attributes.background: The UK Government should introduce stricter rules to limit political party influence over television news broadcasters, ensuring impartiality, transparency, and public trust in the media. We are seeing one party in particular benefit from this

rejection.details:
We are unclear what specific action you are calling for. You can submit a new petition setting this out more clearly.

You may also wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
'Conduct a review of political news regulation by Ofcom'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/739068
